news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings

holdings.infoBox: MFIG is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 5.32%, Alphabet at 5.28%, Eli Lilly and Company at 5.17%, Apple at 5.06%, and Lam Research at 5.04%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Innovative Growth ETF (MFIG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool Innovative Growth index. The fund tracks a proprietary rule-based index that aims to invest in the most US growth-oriented companies recommended by The Motley Fool, LLC. Stocks are selected and weighted using conviction and growth factor scores MFIG was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by The Motley Fool.

data.title: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings
data.text: ALEXANDRIA, Va., Dec. 09, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Motley Fool Asset Management (“MFAM”) announced today the launch of three new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) designed to bring The Motley Fool, LLC's (...
